```bash
`r if (!is.null(config$sched$account)) {paste0(config$remote$shebang, "\n", config$sched$comment, " ", config$sched$flag$account, "=", config$sched$account)} else {paste0(config$remote$shebang)}`
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$queue`=`r config$sched$queue$testing`
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$name`=array-freq
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$nodes`=1
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$tasks`=1
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$array`=1-4
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$time`=00:05:00

# Do a word frequency analysis of each of the following
# datasets simultaneously: we should be able to process
# all four in the same time it took for just the first.
#
# data.1 contains The collected works of Shakespeare
# data.2 contains Canterbury Tales by Geoffrey Chaucer
# data.3 contains Moby Dick by Herman Melville
# data.4 contains The Odyssey by Homer

echo "Starting word frequency script"
bash word-freq.sh data.${SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID}
echo "Finished word frequency script"
```
